question: [File: 'File Name: rest/controllers/tokenAllowanceController.js -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Function: getAccountTokenAllowances()] Can an unprivileged external user send requests with a valid account ID and spender.id=gte:1&spender.id=lte:9223372036854775807&token.id=gte:1, causing all three subquery paths to be generated, where the inner subquery has spender > 1 (operator changed by getInnerFilters()) and the upper subquery has spender = max_long, resulting in three separate DB queries per request?
